goal: 同步分层授权结构到 README 和 LICENSE

summary.title: 同步分层授权结构到 README 和 LICENSE
summary.what: 按用户补充建议细化分层授权模型，并同步正式授权文件：README.md 和 README.zh.md 将 telemetry wording 改为 hosted search/indexing/analytics/cloud infrastructure，明确 Mainline Core local-first 和 trademark compatibility policy；LICENSE 从 PolyForm Shield 摘要改为分层授权声明，列出 Apache-2.0、CC-BY-4.0、商标、hosted commercial surfaces、local-first data boundary 和 previous versions；CONTRIBUTING.md 同步 contributor licensing，避免继续引用旧 PolyForm/source-available 模型。
summary.why: 用户要求 LICENSE 文件也同步，并进一步明确三个关键点：spec/protocol 用 Apache-2.0，telemetry 表述避免让开发者误会 CLI 会偷偷上传数据，trademark policy 要允许兼容性描述但禁止冒充官方。README、LICENSE 和 CONTRIBUTING 必须一致，否则仓库授权信号会互相矛盾。
summary.user_goal: 同步分层授权结构到 README 和 LICENSE

decisions.chose: Intent Record Spec 和 Agent Context Protocol 统一写为 Apache-2.0。
decisions.rationale: Apache-2.0 对工程实现者更清楚，避免 CC license 让实现 schema/protocol 的团队疑惑 attribution 或实现许可边界。

decisions.chose: Docs、essays、examples 写为 CC-BY-4.0 和 Apache-2.0 双许可，可任选其一使用。
decisions.rationale: CC-BY-4.0 适合引用、教学和传播；Apache-2.0 保持工程复用路径清晰。

decisions.chose: 改为 hosted search/indexing/analytics/cloud infrastructure，并补 local-first data boundary。
decisions.rationale: 避免让读者误解本地 CLI 默认上传 telemetry；Mainline 的信任基础是 repo-owned、Git-native、local-first。

decisions.chose: 同时更新 LICENSE 和 CONTRIBUTING，而不是只改 README。
decisions.rationale: README 宣称新授权模型后，LICENSE/CONTRIBUTING 继续写 PolyForm 会造成明显冲突。

rejected.alternative: 继续保留 PolyForm Shield 作为根 LICENSE，只在 README 说明未来可能迁移。
rejected.reason: 用户已经明确要求 LICENSE 文件也更新；保留旧 LICENSE 会让新授权结构没有正式仓库入口。

rejected.alternative: 把 hosted analytics 简写成 telemetry。
rejected.reason: telemetry 容易被理解为本地 CLI 默认上传数据，与 local-first 信任边界冲突。

review_notes: 验证：`git diff --check` 通过；README.md、README.zh.md、LICENSE、CONTRIBUTING.md 中已无 PolyForm/source-available/AGPL/hosted telemetry 旧表述。
LICENSE 采用分层授权声明并链接 Apache License 2.0 与 CC BY 4.0 正文；它不是逐文件 SPDX header 扫描或法律审查。

architectural_claims: Mainline's local developer, agent, SDK, and protocol surfaces are documented as open Apache-2.0-oriented surfaces.
Docs, essays, and examples are documented as dual-licensed under CC-BY-4.0 and Apache-2.0.
Hosted cloud/search/indexing/analytics infrastructure and brand rights remain outside the open-source distribution.
Mainline Core is documented as local-first: repository data should not be sent to Mainline Cloud unless a user explicitly connects a hosted service.
behavioral_changes: Root LICENSE now describes the layered licensing model instead of PolyForm Shield 1.0.0.
README license sections now use Apache-2.0 for Intent Record Spec and Agent Context Protocol.
README license sections now avoid the ambiguous telemetry term and describe hosted search/indexing/analytics/cloud infrastructure as commercial infrastructure outside the open-source distribution.
README and LICENSE now include compatibility-friendly trademark guidance and disallow official-sounding Mainline marks without permission.
CONTRIBUTING contributor licensing now points to the layered LICENSE model.
migration_notes: Formal per-file SPDX headers, NOTICE details, and contributor agreement workflow are not added in this documentation pass.
